title: Music for the Burned Out. Merch for the Birds.
content: From the 'Spark' that started it all to the 'Whelmed' era of 2025. Corporate-approved? Absolutely not.

title: Shake-Tested & Crow-Approved
content: We don't just ship music; we ship resilience in a recycled bubble-lined mailer. Every CD is shake-tested to ensure no rattling, and every purchase supports our chaotic dream to quit the 9-to-5 forever.
